message:
Merge PR #1205: fix(role): remove incorrect /rig suffix from crew/polecat paths

getRoleHome() was appending '/rig' to crew and polecat workspace paths,
but these workspaces do not have that subdirectory structure. Only mayor
and refinery roles have the /rig subdirectory.

This caused 'gt sling' to fail for crew workers with:
  Error: cooking formula: chdir .../crew/name/rig: no such file or directory

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/1205
Author: aleiby
